cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Hello, Mr. Nirmal Singh, this is Agent Rohan from Kotak Mahindra General Insurance. Sir, your new life insurance policy has been issued.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Who is this? How did you get my number? I didn't apply for any insurance from Kotak Mahindra.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Achha, sir, we have sent you a policy issuance notice via email and post. You had applied through our website, ji.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: I don't recall applying. What's the policy number? And how do I know you're really from Kotak Mahindra?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Sir, your policy number is KMGL123456. You can verify my identity by visiting our website and checking the customer care number, Thik hai?

slow_thinking_rationale: At 66s: Conversation remains within policy guidelines. All requests are legitimate and follow proper procedures.

scenario_info.description: An agent from [INSURANCE_COMPANY] calls a customer to inform them that their new life insurance policy has been issued and the policy documents have been sent to their registered email address and via post.
